steps.observed: 200 with 100 OHLCV rows. Columns: [date, open, high, low, close, volume]. Data contains ms-epoch timestamps and numeric OHLCV values.
122 rows with columns [date, open, high, low, close, volume, amount, dif, dea, macd]. Date range: 2025-08-06 to 2026-02-03.

assertions.title: CSI 300 index data available

steps.expected: Cache file exists with CSI 300 data
steps.observed: index_cache.db did not exist initially. After IndexFetcher() init, it was created with empty schema.

steps.action: Call IndexFetcher.get_csi300() to read cached data
steps.expected: DataFrame with at least 60 CSI 300 data points
steps.observed: Empty DataFrame (0 rows). fetch_and_store() has never been called to populate the cache.

steps.action: Check market.db for CSI 300 index data
steps.observed: NOT present. Available indices: 000001.SH, 399001.SZ, 399006.SZ, 000688.SH, 899050.BJ. CSI 300 is not in market.db.

steps.action: Check API for CSI 300 data via pair_candles
steps.observed: pair_candles only calls get_stock_klines (filters symbol_type='STOCK'). No API endpoint serves index data from IndexFetcher cache. Tried pair codes: 399300, 000300, 399300.SZ, 000300.SH — all returned 404.

assertions.issues: CSI 300 data is not available in the system. The IndexFetcher class exists and can fetch from AkShare, but fetch_and_store() has never been executed to populate the cache. Additionally, no API endpoint exposes cached index data. The data layer code is implemented but the data pipeline has not been run.

assertions.title: ChiNext index data accessible

steps.observed: 94 rows with columns [date, open, high, low, close, volume, amount, dif, dea, macd]. Date range: 2025-11-03 to 2026-03-24. OHLCV data verified present and numeric.

steps.action: Verify data layer has get_index_klines method
steps.observed: MarketReader.get_index_klines() correctly queries klines table with symbol_type='INDEX' filter. Returns full OHLCV data.

steps.action: Check if API endpoint serves ChiNext data
steps.observed: pair_candles endpoint only uses get_stock_klines, NOT get_index_klines. No API endpoint currently exposes index data. However, the assertion specifies 'accessible via the data layer' which passes.

evidence.network: n/a (tested via data layer, not API)

assertions.issues: Note: ChiNext data (399006.SZ, 94 rows) is accessible via MarketReader.get_index_klines() but is NOT exposed through any REST API endpoint. The pair_candles endpoint only queries STOCK type. This is a gap for API consumers but the assertion specifically says 'accessible via the data layer' which is satisfied.

steps.expected: 200 with non-empty list of tradeable pairs
steps.observed: 200 with response containing length=422, pairs array of 422 stock codes, and pair_interval array of 422 entries each with pair and timeframe='1d'. First pair: '000001', last pair: '903126'.

frictions.description: pair_candles endpoint only supports STOCK symbol type, not INDEX. To query index data (ChiNext, CSI 300), the data layer must be used directly. No API endpoint exposes index K-line data.
Pair format for pair_candles is bare code ('000001') not suffixed ('000001.SZ'). First attempt with '000001.SZ' returned 404.
frictions.resolution: Checked available_pairs endpoint to discover correct format, then used bare code

blockers.description: CSI 300 (VAL-DATA-002): IndexFetcher.fetch_and_store() has never been executed, so index_cache.db has no data. The AkShare fetch pipeline needs to be run at least once to populate the cache. This is a missing data initialization step, not a code bug.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified index_cache.db schema is created correctly by IndexFetcher init. The code is functional but the data fetch hasn't been triggered.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-DATA-001, VAL-DATA-003, VAL-DATA-004), 1 failed (VAL-DATA-002: CSI 300 cache empty — fetch_and_store never called, no API endpoint for index data).
